heading: Persons present at delivery of goods and money
label: 112 Persons present at delivery of goods and money
text: The superintendent, agent, or subagent, together with such military officer as the President may direct, shall be present, and certify to the delivery of all goods and money required to be paid or delivered to the Indians.
notes: CodificationR.S. § 2088 derived from , .act June 30, 1834, ch. 162, § 134 Stat. 737
Indian AgentsThe services of Indian agents have been dispensed with. See note set out under .section 64 of this title

Transfer of FunctionsFor transfer of functions of other officers, employees, and agencies of Department of the Interior, with certain exceptions, to Secretary of the Interior, with power to delegate, see Reorg. Plan No. 3 of 1950, §§ 1, 2, eff. , 15 F.R. 3174, , set out in the Appendix to Title 5, Government Organization and Employees.May 24, 195064 Stat. 1262
